data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. Scheduled to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Murray, Utah, Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. (NYSE: BBBY) has shared plans to release its first quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Monday, April 27, 2026. The company, which owns Bed Bath & Beyond, Overstock, buybuy BABY, Kirkland’s Home, and a blockchain asset portfolio, will also host a conference call and webcast at 4:30pm ET on the same day to delve into the results and address any questions from participants.

US STOCKS ROSE ON OPTIMISM AROUND A POTENTIAL IRAN CEASEFIRE, WITH THE S&P 500, DOW JONES AND NASDAQ GAINING MODESTLY AS INVESTORS POSITIONED FOR POSSIBLE DE-ESCALATION, WHILE OIL PRICES EDGED HIGHER AMID ONGOING UNCERTAINTY.

data.title: Treasure Global Reappoints Former CEO Sam Teo as Acting CEO to Lead Next Phase of Growth; Carlson Thow to Continue as Executive Director
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Treasure Global Inc. (NASDAQ: TGL), a tech company based in Southeast Asia, revealed the reinstatement of Sam Teo as Acting CEO starting April 1, 2026. Sam Teo, a former CEO, reprises his role to lead the company's growth and operational strategies.

data.title: Company to reveal Q1 2026 results on May 5, 2026.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.8%, indicating a positive trend in the job market. The report also highlights that the economy added 250,000 new jobs last month, surpassing expectations. Additionally, it mentions that the stock market experienced a significant increase, with the S&P 500 reaching a new all-time high of 4,200 points. This news demonstrates a promising outlook for the economy and employment opportunities.

data.title: Workiva Sets Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Release and Conference Call
data.description: Workiva Inc. (NYSE:WK) has revealed that it is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, post-market closure on May 5, 2026. To delve into these results, the company will conduct a conference call and live webcast. The conference call is scheduled to kick off at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on May 5, 2026, and interested parties can join by dialing 1-833-630-1956 (U.S. domestic code omitted for security purposes). Workiva Inc. is recognized as a prominent, AI-driven platform fostering trust, transparency, and accountability in business operations.

data.title: Rambus to Announce First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: Rambus Inc., a leading chip and silicon IP provider known for enhancing data speed and security, will conduct a conference call on Monday, April 27, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. PT to review its first quarter fiscal year 2026 outcomes. The call will be webcasted through Rambus' website at investor.rambus.com. Post the call, a replay will be accessible on the Rambus Investor Relations website and for one week afterward.

data.title: Owlet Announces CEO Transition; Board Reaffirms Q1 2026 Guidance and Long-Term Growth Opportunity
data.description: In Lehi, Utah, Owlet, Inc. (NYSE: OWLT), a leading provider of smart infant monitoring technology, shared that Jonathan Harris has stepped down as President and CEO. Kurt Workman, the current Executive Chair and co-founder, will take over as the new President and CEO. Harris' resignation comes as a surprise, with Workman returning to steer the company forward. Owlet expressed gratitude for Harris' contributions and named Workman as his successor to continue serving families globally.

data.title: Veradigm Appoints Christian Greyenbuhl as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Veradigm Inc. has appointed Christian Greyenbuhl as its new Chief Financial Officer. Greyenbuhl will assume the role starting on May 11, 2026, or the first business day following the filing of the company's Annual Report on Form 10-K for the 2023 and 2024 fiscal years, as mutually agreed. With over 25 years of experience in operations and finance, Greyenbuhl's appointment is a strategic move for the leading provider of clinical and revenue cycle solutions for independent practices, traded under the OTCMKTS: MDRX.

data.title: Empire State Realty Trust Announces Acquisition and Financing Transactions Within Its NYC Retail Portfolio
data.description: In New York, Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: ESRT) recently purchased a newly built retail property at 41-55 North 6th Street in Williamsburg, Brooklyn for $46 million in the first quarter. The property spans about 22,000 square feet and is vacant, situated between Kent and Wythe Avenues. It adds to the Company's current 102,000 square foot portfolio of retail assets along North 6th Street.

data.title: FrontView REIT Provides First Quarter Investment Update
data.description: In Dallas, FrontView REIT, Inc. declared its first-quarter investment progress today. Throughout the initial quarter of 2026, the company procured properties amounting to $34 million, resulting in a net investment of $24 million. This achievement aligns with the company's projected goals, as stated by Stephen Preston, the Chairman and CEO. He mentioned, "We are progressing as planned towards our 2026 goal of $100 million in net investments, supported by an expanding list of potential opportunities."

data.title: AB to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on April 28, 2026
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee today, AllianceBernstein L.P. and AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. revealed that their financial and operating results for the First Quarter of 2026 will be disclosed to the public before the market opens on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The company's stock, listed as AB on the New York Stock Exchange, will be closely watched by investors to gauge its performance. Management is set to hold a discussion following the release, providing insights into the numbers and operations of the firm.
Nanox will release Q4 2025 financial results on April 20, 2026.

data.title: TEN Ltd. Declares Dividend on its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares
data.description: In Athens, Greece on April 6, 2026, TEN Ltd. (NYSE: TEN), a prominent crude, product, and LNG tanker operator, revealed that their Board of Directors approved the standard quarterly cash dividend of around $0.59375 per share for its Series F Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares, known as the "Series F Preferred Shares" on NYSE as TENPRF.

data.title: Cisco Appoints Pete Shimer to its Board of Directors
data.description: Cisco has recently announced the appointment of Pete Shimer to its board of directors. Shimer, a former Deloitte executive and accomplished board leader, joins the company effective immediately. With over 40 years of executive experience and a strong background in C-suite positions, Shimer will serve on the Board's Audit Committee. This strategic move further strengthens Cisco's leadership team and brings valuable expertise to the company as it continues to grow.
Immuneering to speak at the 25th Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference.

data.title: Tripadvisor Repays Convertible Senior Notes
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in Needham, Massachusetts, Tripadvisor, Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIP) disclosed that they have fully repaid their 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes due in 2026 ("2026 Senior Notes"). This repayment amount totaled $345.4 million, which included both the principal sum and the accumulated interest. The payment was facilitated by utilizing the company's available cash reserves. It was highlighted that no holders of the notes opted for conversion to Tripadvisor stock.

data.title: ThredUp to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: Oakland, California-based ThredUp, a prominent online resale platform for clothing and accessories, is set to disclose its financial performance for Q1 2026 on May 4, 2026, following the closure of U.S. markets. The company, listed as TDUP on NASDAQ and LTSE, will unveil its results and host a live webcast and conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day. This announcement signifies an eagerly anticipated update on ThredUp's performance in the first quarter of the year, providing investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's growth and financial standing.

data.title: Largest Independent Shareholder of Neuronetics, Inc., Jorey Chernett, Calls for Immediate and Comprehensive Review of Strategic Alternatives, Including Sale of TMS Business
data.description: A letter has been sent to the STIM board by Jorey Chernett, the biggest independent shareholder of Neuronetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: STIM), based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan on April 6, 2026. In the letter, it was outlined that there is a potential 5-7x upside for shareholders through the sale of TMS and standalone clinic business.
CEO James Heckman reveals NASDAQ strategy, long-term focus, capitalization structure, and lock-up plans in roundtable discussion.

data.title: PennantPark Investment Corporation Schedules Earnings Release of Second Fiscal Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: PennantPark Investment Corporation, listed on the NYSE as PNNT, disclosed that it is scheduled to release its financial results for the second fiscal quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The announcement will take place on Thursday, May 7, 2026, following the closure of the financial markets.
